operator_intent: Find the hidden threads between these five disparate research papers.

required_organs.reason: The organism must first know exactly which five papers are in scope and whether their text can be read.
required_organs.failure_prevented: Wrong corpus, missing paper, duplicate paper, stale file, invented source, or analysis before source boundaries are proven.
required_organs.proof_required: SOURCE_MANIFEST_RECEIPT with exactly five paper entries including path_or_url, title, hash_or_stable_id, readable_text_status, and extraction_method.

required_organs.reason: The work needs intake, process, and exhale proof so the synthesis is not just a chat claim.
required_organs.failure_prevented: False delivery, false intake, unprovable processing, or output that cannot be tied back to the five source papers.
required_organs.proof_required: NMCLR respiratory receipt showing paper intake, synthesis process, and written output/readback.

required_organs.reason: The organism must perform the comparison work and write a durable hidden-thread artifact.
required_organs.failure_prevented: Intent-only analysis, no artifact, no work log, or no packet-work-artifact chain.
required_organs.proof_required: NMCLR muscle receipt proving packet -> comparison work -> hidden_threads artifact.

required_organs.reason: Hidden-thread work is vulnerable to attractive but unsupported patterns, so each proposed thread needs evidence checks.
required_organs.failure_prevented: Hallucinated connections, overfit themes, false equivalence across papers, or unsupported synthesis.
required_organs.proof_required: EVIDENCE_CHECK_RECEIPT requiring every hidden thread to cite at least two source papers and include evidence snippets or section references.

excluded_organs.reason: No watcher/event detection is required for a one-time provided corpus.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: The papers arrive asynchronously in a watched folder or inbox.

excluded_organs.reason: No multi-machine or multi-surface routing is required for local synthesis.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: The source papers or outputs must move between TinkerDen, Speaker, Sally, Betsy, or another receiver.

excluded_organs.reason: The intent asks for a synthesis artifact, not future behavior change from a prior receipt.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: A later packet must behave differently because of this synthesis.

excluded_organs.reason: No doctrine, behavior, or inheritance promotion is requested.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: The hidden-thread output must become a reusable rule, chapter, protocol, or future action behavior.

excluded_organs.reason: For V0, candidate relationship discovery can live inside the muscle comparison step without spawning a separate organ.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: The system must continuously rank or pull related sources across a growing library.

excluded_organs.reason: No global priority, mood, timing, or system-wide modulation is required.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: The intent should change urgency, tone, or resource allocation across the organism.

excluded_organs.reason: No new structure, UI, workflow, or organism shape is required.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: The result demands a new durable research-workflow form or interface.

excluded_organs.reason: The output does not need to be promoted into long-term memory for V0.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: The hidden threads must become durable memory, doctrine, or reusable research context.

excluded_organs.reason: The intent names five papers, not open-ended web or corpus crawling.
excluded_organs.reconsider_if: The operator asks to discover additional papers, citations, or external threads.

human_gates_required.required_if: The five papers require credentials, paid access, private storage, or contain sensitive material.
human_gates_required.reason: Accessing or exporting restricted material changes privacy/account/legal exposure.

human_gates_required.required_if: The synthesis will be sent, published, committed, or shared outside the local workspace.
human_gates_required.reason: Exhale beyond local proof changes external/shared state.

human_gates_required.required_if: The synthesis is promoted into doctrine, manuscript, memory, protocol, or canonical truth.
human_gates_required.reason: Assimilation changes future behavior and requires operator approval.

termination_condition.natural_death: Stop after either a BLOCKED_SOURCE_MANIFEST receipt is written, or after one hidden_threads synthesis artifact and one proof receipt are written and read back.
termination_condition.no_background_life: No watcher, crawler, dashboard, or recurring process remains alive after the proof receipt.

first_executable_proof_step.action: Create a read-only manifest for the five papers before analysis.
first_executable_proof_step.inputs_required: Five paper paths, URLs, or uploaded artifacts.
first_executable_proof_step.success_condition: Exactly five readable source entries exist with title, path_or_url, hash_or_stable_id, extraction_status, and timestamp.
first_executable_proof_step.reject_condition: Fewer than five readable papers, unresolvable sources, duplicate sources, missing hash/stable id, or no extraction path.

pass_fail_assessment.reason: The compiler proposed a restrained anatomy plan with required organs only, explicit exclusions, Human Gates, natural death condition, and a first proof step.
fail_conditions_avoided: Each proposed organ prevents a specific failure.
